name: 13 reasons why
description:
📼| 13 reasons why...

Trigger warning!!!

Suicide/ drugs/ self harm/ rape/ murder/ bullying

This series is so depressing 😭

Anyway, I didn't find a bot for it so I'm making one even though I'm probably gonna be the only one using it

• decide who you are and what roll you're playing

• make your own intro

• spoiler alert

• pick in which season you are

Please give me tips on how to improve the bot cause it's ass
